pipelineStrategy: Additive and safe: legacy generator, scheduler CLI, and manifest import run alongside existing blog APIs and cron routes. The current pipeline was not removed (preserves production stability).
importMode: Run `cd nursenest-core && npm run blog:import:legacy-manifest:apply` against production DATABASE_URL to persist rows (default command is dry-run).
step7_frontendVerification: Manual: open /blog and sample post URLs on production; confirm /sitemaps/blog.xml lists slugs; category pages as your app defines them.
notes: Last run in CI/dev used databaseStatus=unreachable; dedupe file lists would_create for all 10 slugs until DB is available.
Legacy tools wrap generateBlogPost and existing cron routes; admin batch schedule unchanged.
Preserves slugs/SEO: manifest rows include seoTitle, seoDescription, relatedLessonPaths, relatedTools.
